name: Super Spinning Mills Limited
summary: Super Spinning Mills Limited manufactures and sells cotton yarn for knitting and weaving in India. It offers ring, compact, compact elitwist, TFO doubled, gassed, TFO, organic, and BCI cotton yarns; and specialty yarns, such as modal and micro modal, tencel and micro tencel, cotton blended modal and micro modal, and cotton blended tencel and micro tencel yarns. The company also exports its products. Super Spinning Mills Limited was founded in 1962 and is based in Coimbatore, India.
